form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up won by 1.75 len at Sunshine Coast Bm68 February 22 over 1200m defeating Joy A Plenty carrying 57kg at $16. Second-up sat behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 11 at this track Cl6-Sw on March 14 over 1400m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Castillian carrying 58.5kg at $12. Worth another chance back in this far easier race.

form.formComment: Comes off a 44 day let-up. Most recently raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 9 at Sandown-Hillside F&M Bm74 on February 25 over 1400m, slow going 9 len behind Terilee with 59kg at $41. The race before that ran last in a small field at Caulfield Heath F&M Bm74 on February 9 over 1600m, 7 len behind Mystery 'N' Drama with 60kg at $14. Now with Matthew Dunn and should make an immediate impact for the new stable.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months raced on the pace when 2nd of 10 at this track Bm65 on March 21 over 1300m, 2 len behind Fasvara with 61kg at $21. Previously second-up ran last of 10 at Doomben Cg&E Cl6 on August 16 over 1350m, 9 len behind Slippin' Jimmy carrying 54kg at $81. Has a solid second-up record and is a definite top-three hope.
